articles.title: Bangladesh opt to bat, SA unchanged in high-stakes game
articles.description: Bangladesh brought in Taj Nehar for Dilara Akter at the top of the order

articles.title: LAKR lose 10 for 50 after Pooran rescues MI New York
articles.description: Colin Munro's run out sparked a dramatic collapse while Romario Shepherd produced the most economical figures in MLC

articles.title: Chaudhary's last-ball six wins it for Freedom after Hosein's hat-trick
articles.description: Mitchell Owen set up Freedom's chase with 77 off 35 before the match hurtled towards a chaotic finish

articles.title: Zimbabwe opt to bowl; Bangladesh hand debuts to Amite Hasan and Towhid Hridoy
articles.description: For Zimbabwe, Wessly Madhevere took the spot of Sikandar Raza but there was no room for Graeme Cremer

articles.title: 'An amazing day' - Amir Jangoo takes in double-hundred after late call-up
articles.description: Captain Roston Chase ended a more than seven-year wait for another hundred in what became a mammoth sixth-wicket stand

articles.title: Prolific West Indies batter Charlie Davis dies aged 82
articles.description: In a Test career that ran from 1968 to 1973, Davis scored 1301 runs at an average of 54.20

articles.title: Australia hold the key as India, South Africa chase semi-final spots
articles.description: South Africa are the favourites to beat Bangladesh, but their poor net run rate means their chances hinge on Australia beating India

articles.title: Molineux wants to 'double down' on the pressure on India
articles.description: India cannot afford any mistakes with a semi-final spot on the line. Australia, meanwhile, have all but qualified

articles.title: Zimbabwe look to build on rare Test momentum against Bangladesh
articles.description: Ngarava begins his captaincy stint as Zimbabwe seek to back up last year's Sylhet win over a confident Bangladesh

articles.title: Jangoo 233, Chase 194 put West Indies in commanding position
articles.description: Their 401-run stand turned out to be the highest in Test-cricket history for the sixth wicket

articles.title: Aakash Chopra picks India's playing XI for must-win 2nd T20I vs Ireland, suggests two changes
articles.description: India lost the first T20I at the Civil Service Cricket Club in Belfast against Ireland on Friday, June 26, by 34 runs to go 0-1 down in the two-match series.

articles.title: ENG vs NZ 2026: 'Hopefully, the wicket is going to be at its hardest to bat' - Zak Foulkes on Trent Bridge pitch
articles.description: Accurate and disciplined bowling from the Kiwis on Day 3 saw England squander a dominant position from 223 for 2, being bundled out for 354.

articles.title: WI vs SL 2026: 'Words can't describe how I feel right now' - Amir Jangoo after marathon double-century
articles.description: Playing just his second Test match, the 28-year-old made the most of his chance, recording the highest score for a West Indies batter since Marlon Samuels' 260 against Bangladesh in 2012.

articles.title: [WATCH] ‘Hopefully, I will get a chance to…’ Novak Djokovic opens up on friendship with Virat Kohli
articles.description: Speaking ahead of the 2026 edition of Wimbledon Championships, the 24-time Grand Slam champion shed light on his equation with Kohli.

articles.title: ‘Great example for youngsters like him’ - Dilip Vengsarkar urges Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to emulate Sachin Tendulkar’s discipline ahead of India debut
articles.description: If the left-handed batter gets an opportunity in the remaining matches, he will become the youngest player to represent India in men’s international cricket, breaking Tendulkar’s long-standing record.

articles.title: WI vs SL 2026: Amir Jangoo, Roston Chase script history with record partnership
articles.description: Their 401-run stand is now the highest partnership for the sixth wicket in Test cricket history, also being the first time in Test cricket history that a pair has put on 400 runs for the sixth wicket.

articles.title: [WATCH] England give guard of honour to New Zealand legends Sophie Devine, Suzie Bates and Lea Tahuhu after World Cup farewell
articles.description: The touching tribute drew warm applause from the packed crowd as the trio walked through the guard of honour one final time in New Zealand colours.

articles.title: Shubman Gill meets football legend Ronaldinho in iconic crossover
articles.description: India's Test and ODI skipper Shubman Gill was recently spotted sitting alongside football icon Ronaldinho amid the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2026.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: WI W vs IRE W Today's Match Highlights: Unmissable video recap, POTM, match analysis, stats and more
articles.description: West Indies Women suffered a devastating defeat against Ireland Women in match No. 27 of the ongoing Women's T20 World Cup 2026 at the County Ground in Bristol on Saturday, June 27.

articles.title: 'We want to play aggressive brand of cricket against Australia' - Smriti Mandhana ahead of India's must-win clash in Women's T20 World Cup
articles.description: “We’ve been speaking a lot in the batting meeting about how we really want to go out there and bat with intent," Smriti Mandhana said ahead of the all-important clash against Australia.
